title: ozoroa obovata var. elliptica
intro: Ozoroa obovata var. elliptica, also known as the elliptical bushwillow, is a plant species belonging to the family Anacardiaceae, which is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ozoroa obovata var. elliptica include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste for local use in herbal medicine, with the bark and roots being used for various treatments.
